suppressions.reason: REAL gap, tracked: Basecamp card 9985243886 - the verification reminder honors an opt-out nothing can set. Fix = wire into edit-profile notification prefs + unsubscribe link.
Audit-trail timestamp written on email verification (class-auth-controller.php:538) - intentionally write-only; kept for support/forensics.

Operator escape hatch: CLI scenarios read it to pin the acting admin, falling back to the first administrator (class-cli.php:292). Intentionally write-less; setting it via wp option update is the documented override.
REAL gap, tracked: Basecamp card 9985243976 - BP broadcast toggle has no settings UI; operators flip via wp option update. Read defaults ON with safe fallback.
REAL gap, tracked: Basecamp card 9985243976 - same card as jetonomy_bp_broadcast (BP integration settings checkboxes).
False positive: written via class constant OPTION_SETTINGS - add_option at email-digest/class-extension.php:95-97 and update_option at :2020.
Dev seeding tooling (bin/seed-qa-pages.php) - fixture ledger, never read by shipped code by design.
Dev seeding tooling (bin/seed-qa-users.php) - written as a fixture ledger for manual cleanup, never read by shipped code by design.
Stale defensive delete_option in uninstall.php for a key no version ever wrote; harmless, remove on next uninstall.php touch.
Fired at runtime via Queue::async(self::ASYNC_EVAL_USER) (custom-badges/class-extension.php:171) - class-constant dispatch is invisible to the static scan.
Fired at runtime via Queue::recurring(self::CRON_HOOK, 5min) (reply-by-email/class-extension.php:70) - class-constant dispatch.

Fired at runtime via Queue::async(self::ASYNC_HOOK) (webhooks/class-extension.php:175) - class-constant dispatch. The web-push:66 attribution is the scanner resolving the same-named constant across classes; web-push ASYNC_HOOK is jetonomy_pro_send_push.

Fired at runtime via Queue::async(self::ASYNC_HOOK_EXPO) in on_notification_created (web-push/class-extension.php:518) - Action Scheduler async dispatch via class constant, invisible to the static scan. Same pattern as the browser jetonomy_pro_send_push hook. New native-push transport in 1.6.0.

False positive. 'jetonomy_space_member_role_changed' is a do_action extension hook fired at includes/models/class-space-member.php:202 (do_action($hook,$space_id,$user_id,$role,$old_role)), NOT an admin-ajax action. No wp_ajax_ handler is required; the scanner's ajax heuristic matched a do_action hook name.

False positive. Pro webhook-delivery prune job: bound at includes/extensions/webhooks/class-extension.php:89 (add_action(self::PRUNE_HOOK,...)) and scheduled daily at :90 (Queue::recurring(self::PRUNE_HOOK, DAY_IN_SECONDS)). Fired by the Queue/cron scheduler; scanner cannot resolve the const at the schedule site.

False positive. Fired via Jetonomy_Pro\Queue::recurring(self::GC_HOOK, DAY_IN_SECONDS) in attachments Extension::activate() -> as_schedule_recurring_action()/wp_schedule_event(). Scheduler indirection the static scanner cannot resolve; same class as the other baselined Queue-scheduled hooks (badges_eval_user, dispatch_webhook, send_expo_push).

False positive. Called via self.ajax('jetonomy_generate_invite', ...) in assets/js/admin.js:992 (dynamic action string). Real space-invite admin feature; REST twin POST /spaces/{id}/invite also exists. Same dynamic-dispatch pattern as the other baselined admin AJAX handlers.
False positive. Called via self.ajax('jetonomy_list_invites', ...) in assets/js/admin.js:950 (dynamic action string). Real space-invite admin feature.
False positive. Called via self.ajax('jetonomy_revoke_invite', ...) in assets/js/admin.js:1033 (dynamic action string). Real space-invite admin feature.

False positive. Read via WP_Query meta_query key clauses in includes/class-media-library.php (lines 77-84 list scope; 245-252 exclude clause). Scanner only recognizes get_post_meta() as a read, not meta_query key usage.
False positive. Read via meta_query in includes/class-media-library.php:351-358 (one-shot backfill guard). Scanner only recognizes get_post_meta() reads, not meta_query key usage.

triaged: 2026-06-11 - first run on the pair; full triage in commit message. Real findings carded: 9985243886 (email opt-out unsettable), 9985243976 (BP toggles no UI).
